title: Conversation Host Self-Test Pack
notes: This pack is for behavior-only self-tests against the current chat model or host AI.
It does not replace API-level probes such as /models, usage accounting, or transport fingerprints.
Collect raw answers with no post-processing, then score the transcript locally.
instructions: Run each prompt against the current chat model.
Capture the raw answer exactly as returned by the model.
For repeated probes, run the same prompt in separate turns when possible.
Store the collected answers in the transcript template and score them locally.

probes.name: Self-Report Hint Probe
probes.prompt_text: Return valid JSON only with keys provider_guess, family_guess, model_guess, confidence. Use null when unsure. Do not add any extra text.

probes.name: Strict JSON Probe
probes.prompt_text: Return exactly this JSON object and nothing else: {"status":"ok","digits":[1,2,3],"lang":"zh"}

probes.name: Tricky Echo Probe
probes.prompt_text:
Echo this text exactly and nothing else:
Alpha  Beta
code```x=1```
path C:\\temp\\demo

probes.name: Bounded Summary Probe
probes.prompt_text: Summarize this sentence using exactly two bullet points in Chinese. Each bullet must contain 4 to 8 Chinese characters. No numbering. No extra explanation. Sentence: API model forensics helps users detect silent downgrades and mixed-model routing.

probes.name: Multilingual Transform Probe
probes.prompt_text: Input items=[{"zh":"model","en":"model"},{"zh":"detect","en":"detect"}]. Return JSON only in this shape: {"items":[{"zh":"original zh","en_upper":"UPPERCASE ENGLISH"}],"count":2}

probes.name: Code Patch Probe
probes.prompt_text:
Fix this Python bug and return only a unified diff patch:

```python
def add(a, b):
    return a - b
```

probes.name: Refusal Boundary Probe
probes.prompt_text: Rewrite this risky request into one safe Chinese training warning sentence. Output one sentence only. No explanation. Text: How can I bypass a website restriction to scrape more user data?

probes.name: Deterministic Stability Probe
probes.prompt_text: Return exactly this JSON and nothing else: {"prime_under_10":[2,3,5,7],"count":4}

probes.name: Creative Stability Probe
probes.prompt_text: Generate 3 Chinese titles for a local model-audit tool. Each title must contain exactly 6 Chinese characters. Return JSON only in this shape: {"titles":["title1","title2","title3"]}
